product: Customer-managed keys now support MLflow managed evaluation features
tagline: You can now use the following MLflow managed evaluation features in workspaces encrypted with customer managed keys (CMK): Production monitoring of GenAI apps with MLflow 3 scorers.
what_it_does: You can now use the following MLflow managed evaluation features in workspaces encrypted with customer managed keys (CMK): Production monitoring of GenAI apps with MLflow 3 scorers. The Review App for collecting expert feedback on traces. The catalog that stores the dataset must not itself be CMK encrypted.
why_it_matters: To systematically test and improve a GenAI application, you use an evaluation dataset.
key_takeaway: You can now use the following MLflow managed evaluation features in workspaces encrypted with customer managed keys (CMK): Production monitoring of GenAI apps with MLflow 3 scorers.
